data.name: Demon Seed - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Demon Seed is a story-driven adult visual novel set in an alternate version of our world.
Enjoy an entertaining blend of supernatural mystery, comedy, and passionate romance, brought to life through stunning visuals and fully animated, voice-acted sex scenes.

Together with Lisa and her daughters Julia and Alana, you live a seemingly ordinary life in the outskirts of one of the biggest habitats on the continent: Initia.

But ordinary is the last thing you are. Women don't just notice you,they are pulled toward you with an intensity that feels almost otherworldly. And lately, the nights bring no relief. Strange dreams haunt your sleep, vivid and relentless, whispering of a heritage you never knew you had.

Then the abilities begin to manifest. Small at first. Then impossible to ignore.
The answers you're searching for run deeper than you ever imagined.

Behind the comfortable life, the passionate encounters, and the darkness creeping into your dreams, lurks a far darker truth.
One tied to ancient powers, a murderous plot, and forces that have been watching you for a long time.

Of course, unraveling an ancient conspiracy is a lot easier when you have lots of beautiful women in your corner. Well... mostly.

Features

  • Rich Story Experience - A narrative-driven journey mixing supernatural mystery, romance,and comedy. 

  • Build Your Harem – Develop deep relationships with a diverse cast of characters each with their own personalities and stories.

  • Stunning Visuals – Thousands of high-resolution renders bringing characters and environments to life

  • Fully Animated & Voiced Adult Scenes – Multiple animated sex scenes with various positions and angles, brought to life with professional voice acting

data.short_description: Demon Seed is a story-driven adult Visual Novel, filled with super natural mystery, comedy and lots of steamy, passionate sex. Unravel the secrets of a long-forgotten heritage and explore your awakening powers. Build intimate relationships with a diverse cast of stunning women and grow your harem.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
